description: Flight search results are updating as the system finishes checking providers.
frame_description: The search progress bar moves and the number of results updates from 'Checked 25 of 26 providers' to '997 results sorted by Best'.

description: User is examining the flight search results, specifically looking at the 'Best', 'Cheapest', and 'Fastest' options.
frame_description: The screen remains static on the top flight results while the user reviews the information.

description: User scrolls down the page to view more flight results and options.
frame_description: The viewport shifts downwards, revealing more flight listings and a 'Select' button at the bottom of the screen.
